art_market.summary: Global art market recovering with a 4% increase in 2025; March 2026 active with exhibitions like Sotheby's Old Master & Modern drawings and the Whitney Biennial 2026.
top_stories: Sotheby's Paris showcasing Old Master & Modern drawings.
New acquisitions at the National Gallery of Art, Washington D.C.
Gallerie dell' Accademia conservation project for Bellini's San Giobbe altarpiece.
Whitney Biennial 2026 is currently a major highlight.

stock_market.summary: Tech sector facing downward pressure on March 27, 2026, with concerns over investment margins and foundry volatility.
key_factors: Brent crude oil surpassed $108 per barrel.
Amazon (AMZN) down 2% due to $200B investment margin concerns.
Intel (INTC) down 6.5% with foundry business volatility.
Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East impacting investor confidence.
